1: Principles for Leading the Augmented Team
2: Successfully leading this framework requires evolving from a sole contributor into the lead of a
3: human-AI team, guided by the following principles:
5: Maintain Architectural Ownership Your role is to set the strategic direction and own
6: the high-level architecture. You define the "what" and the "why," using the agent team to
7: accelerate the "how." You are the final arbiter of design, ensuring every component
8: aligns with the project's long-term vision and quality standards.
